title: epilobium glandulosum var. exaltatum
intro: Epilobium glandulosum var. exaltatum, also known as tall willowherb or exalted willowherb, is a perennial plant species within the family Onagraceae. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful for treating urinary tract issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Epilobium glandulosum var. exaltatum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal medicine to support kidney function and overall well-being.
